task_description: Two-app UI initiative in the revathysupermarket monorepo. (1) Raise apps/mobile-staff (Expo/React Native) to a polished, web-app-quality UI with fluid animations/transitions across all screens and options, using the already-installed Reanimated/Gesture Handler stack, and verify it typechecks/lints cleanly. (2) Analyse apps/web (Next.js) for UI/UX issues and produce a grounded audit plus high-priority fixes. (3) Identify and fix the web app's 'black theme' (dark mode) defects (broken System option, fragile blanket .dark overrides, missing selection contrast, duplicate theme toggles, light-only components). Publishing (push/PR) is handled by the orchestrator.
